judge_reason: Description B quotes specific text on the index card (e.g., 'Hq'd Air Material Command Dayton', 'Subject: Transmittal of Incident Summary Sheets 173 thru 233.') and additional handwritten/stamped text (e.g., 'Endorsed to R/S-S 02378 of 3-9-49', 'CATALOG', 'LIAISON FILE COPY') that Description A does not mention or quotes differently (e.g., 'Inc'l' vs 'Incident Summary Sheets'), creating contradictions on verbatim text within the visual content.
original_image_tags: A blue rectangular label on the top left reads "DECLASSIFIED" with "Authority: NND 917033" below. A dark stamped "SECRET" appears at the top center. Handwritten notes are in blue ink across the center of the page. A smaller index card (Exhibit #529) is taped onto the main page. At the bottom center, another dark stamped "SECRET" appears next to a red stamped date "22 MAR 1949". A handwritten note "Inc'l" is on the bottom left. A "Best Possible Image" blue label is on the bottom left edge. A dark "SECRET" stamp is partially visible at the bottom. A blue "MARARY LISTS" tab label is on the right edge. The bottom right has handwritten numbers "5-20300".
gpt_mini_desc: *Image: A scanned folder cover page with “SECRET” stamped at top and bottom, handwritten notes, three binder holes along the top edge, a small taped document label inset near the lower left-center, and a narrow vertical tab on the right edge labeled “Project Blue Book.”*
